connectors.name: Pipedrive
connectors.description: Sales CRM and pipeline management platform for tracking deals, contacts, and sales activities.

connectors.name: MySQL
connectors.description: Open-source relational database management system (RDBMS) for structured data storage, querying, and management. Widely used for web applications, data warehouses, and transactional systems.

connectors.name: PostgreSQL
connectors.description: Open-source relational database management system (RDBMS) known for reliability, feature robustness, and performance. Supports advanced data types, full ACID compliance, and extensibility.

connectors.name: Wise
connectors.description: API connector for Wise (formerly TransferWise) international money transfer and multi-currency account platform.
